portfolio_concentration_warning: All four trades are single-source (Gemini only). Claude's rate limit failure eliminates cross-validation and consensus-building. Recommend: (1) Reduce macro trade weights to 1-2 each until Claude analysis is available; (2) Weather trade (KXHIGHNY) has <24hr resolution—tactically valid but low informational value; (3) Macro regime remains unvalidated (Gemini 'neutral' is unchallenged but unconfirmed). Portfolio is underweight relative to edge quality. Consider re-running Claude analysis when rate limits reset, or consolidating to highest-edge trades (CPI, GDP, RateCut) and deferring weather.
